extension.description: Auto compile/deploy on save + Tomcat start/stop + Hot Deploy
config.javaHome.description: JDK installation path (uses JAVA_HOME env var if empty)
config.javaSourceRoot.description: Java source path (relative to project root)
config.webContentRoot.description: Web resource path — JSP, HTML, CSS, JS, etc. (relative to project root)
config.resourceRoot.description: Resource path — .xml, .properties, etc. deployed to WEB-INF/classes (relative to project root)
config.manualPortConfig.markdownDescript: **Manual port config** — When checked, debug/redirect ports are set manually. When unchecked, auto-calculated from HTTP port (`debug: 5005 + offset`, `redirect: 8443 + offset`)
config.port.markdownDescription: **HTTP port** — Debug/redirect ports are auto-calculated based on this value.
config.debugPort.markdownDescription: **Debug port** — `🔒 Auto-calculated`: When manual port config is off, auto-calculated from HTTP port (changes will be reverted)
config.redirectPort.markdownDescription: **SSL redirect port** — `🔒 Auto-calculated`: When manual port config is off, auto-calculated from HTTP port (changes will be reverted)
config.javaOpts.description:
Additional JVM options on Tomcat startup (separated by newlines). e.g.
-Xms512m
-Xmx1024m
-Dspring.profiles.active=dev
